audit_summary.summary_text: Static review of the provided skill directory found only SKILL.md and no implementation files to analyze. The documented behavior is consistent with an API contract testing workflow. No evidence was found of instruction override, hidden instructions, external exfiltration, credential harvesting, sensitive file access, remote script fetching, obfuscated code, or reverse-shell behavior. The repeated scanning/convergence language appears operationally aggressive but remains aligned with the stated contract-validation purpose and does not meet the taxonomy threshold for a reportable issue.
